---
name: "🌐 New Translation"
about: Submit a new language translation for PartyUnNoobifier
title: "[LANG] Add <Language> translation"
labels: translation
---

## Language

- **Language**: <!-- e.g. Spanish -->
- **Locale code**: <!-- e.g. es_ES -->

## Credit

> [!IMPORTANT]
> The credit text must be **translated in your language**. It will appear next to the language name in-game.
> Format: `<preposition> §c§l<YourUsername>` — the preposition must match your language (e.g. "by", "par", "von", "por")

- **Credit text**: <!-- e.g. por §c§lMyUsername -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Based on the latest `en_UK.json`
- [ ] All keys are present (no missing translations)
- [ ] Placeholders (`{user}`, `{count}`, etc.) are kept as-is
- [ ] Minecraft formatting codes (`§a`, `§b`, `§l`, etc.) are preserved
- [ ] Credit text is translated in the target language
- [ ] JSON is valid (no syntax errors)
- [ ] Tested in-game (if possible)

## Notes

<!-- Any context about the translation (dialect choices, alternative phrasing, etc.) -->
